'''Please contact Klei on the {{Socials|Discord|true}} if you know what's going on with this thing'''

<!--{{CargoRelic
|name=Dunhuang Scripts
|rank=sss
|affct=fth
|birthday=not this? 03-12
|source=
|description=
|fame=
|art=
|fth=
|civ=
|tech=
|ss1=
|ss2=
|ss3=
|ss4=
|ss5=
|ss6=
|ss7
|skill1=
|skill2=
|skill3=
|mirage=
}}-->
